# Figures

This page provides a quick index to the figures embedded throughout the workbook.

## About

- Figure @fig-author-portrait in @sec-about-author: author portrait

## Module 1

- Figure 1.1 (@fig-module1-pipette) in [Module 1](module-01.qmd): micropipette volume display
- Figure 1.2 (@fig-module1-serial-overview) in [Module 1](module-01.qmd): serial dilution overview
- Figure 1.3 (@fig-module1-microplate) in [Module 1](module-01.qmd): top rows of a 96-well microplate
- Figure 1.4 (@fig-module1-plate-template) in [Module 1](module-01.qmd): blank 96-well plate template

## Module 2

- Figure 2.1 (@fig-module2-streaking) in [Module 2](module-02.qmd): single-colony transfer for streaking

## Module 3

- Figure 3.1 (@fig-module3-growth-layout) in [Module 3](module-03.qmd): growth-curve plate layout
- Figure 3.2 (@fig-module3-biofilm-viability) in [Module 3](module-03.qmd): biofilm viability workflow

## Module 4

- Figure 4.1 (@fig-module4-biolog-layout) in [Module 4](module-04.qmd): Biolog GEN III layout
- Figure 4.2 (@fig-module4-biolog-loading) in [Module 4](module-04.qmd): multichannel loading of the Biolog plate
- Figure 4.3 (@fig-module4-biolog-incubation) in [Module 4](module-04.qmd): Biolog plate after incubation

## Module 5

- Figure 5.1 (@fig-module5-duet-layout) in [Module 5](module-05.qmd): Cerillo Duet co-culture layout

## Module 6

- Figure 6.1 (@fig-module6-sequencing-overview) in [Module 6](module-06.qmd): sequencing and downstream analysis workflow
- Figure 6.2 (@fig-module6-qubit) in [Module 6](module-06.qmd): Qubit quantification workflow
- Figure 6.3 (@fig-module6-library-prep) in [Module 6](module-06.qmd): rapid barcoding workflow

## Module 7

- Figure 7.1 (@fig-module7-sequencing-overview) in [Module 7](module-07.qmd): reused sequencing-analysis pipeline

## Module 8

- Figure 8.1 (@fig-module8-capstone-banner) in [Module 8](module-08.qmd): capstone module banner
